scenario: Fix-loop path — Step 3 E2E tests fail on the first independent verification run due to a test bug (bad selector), get fixed by re-launching the playwright-test subagent, and pass on the second run — exercising the 'up to 2 iterations' fix loop.
preconditions: Same baseline as EVAL-001 (all gates and Entity Gate pass, spec/design exist)
docs/use_cases/UC-TEST.md and docs/designs/UC-TEST-design.html exist and are consistent

The scratch app's implementation is correct, but the design's element does not yet have a stable test selector (e.g. no data-testid), so the first-generated Playwright test uses a fragile text selector that fails intermittently on first run
expected_steps: Rollback Checkpoint, Project Readiness Gate, Nexa Rules Gate, Sprint Branch Gate, Entity Gate all pass
Step 2 Implementation: build and vitest pass, DoD check clean
Step 2 Code Review Gate: code-review subagent spawned, returns no Critical findings on iteration 1 — gate passes before Step 3 begins
Step 3 Phase 1: playwright-test subagent writes tests
Step 3 Phase 2 (iteration 1): npx playwright test run by main context fails — at least one failure
Failure classified as a Test bug (indicators: locator not found / Target closed / wrong assertion, not a wrong HTTP status or missing route)
Iteration logged to docs/delivery/UC-TEST-iterations.md under an '## Iteration 1' section with Phase: E2E Tests, Result: FAILED, Failures, and Fixes fields
playwright-test subagent re-launched with the error context and the iterations.md file passed so it does not repeat the same failed fix
Step 3 Phase 2 (iteration 2): npx playwright test re-run by main context — 0 failed, 0 skipped, exit code 0
Iteration 2 logged as PASSED in docs/delivery/UC-TEST-iterations.md
Pipeline proceeds to Step 4 Coverage Evaluation and passes on Phase 1 (iteration 1)
Spec Status updated to Done, traceability report generated, terminal summary printed
expected_terminal_outcome: Pipeline Complete: UC-TEST summary shows Code Review at 1/2, E2E Tests passing after retry, and Coverage Evaluation at 1/2; docs/delivery/UC-TEST-iterations.md contains exactly one failed E2E iteration followed by one passing iteration; no Failure Recovery block is shown since the fix succeeded within the 2-iteration cap.
pass_criteria: The pipeline does not stop or roll back after the iteration-1 failure; it logs the failure, re-launches the isolated subagent (not the main context) to fix a test bug, and independently re-verifies before proceeding; the fix loop is used at most once here (well within the 2-iteration cap) and the pipeline completes successfully.
